results.title: Japan and Sweden play to 1-1 draw as both advance to knockout round at World Cup
results.description: Daizen Maeda gave Japan the lead and Anthony Elanga took it away six minutes later, giving Sweden a 1-1 draw Thursday night that sent both teams to the knockout round of the World Cup.

results.title: Lawyer says Vondrousova 'should appeal' against four-year ban
results.description: The lawyer for Marketa Vondrousova told AFP on Thursday that he believes the former Wimbledon champion should appeal against the four-year ban.

results.title: Without Giannis, Bucks will lean on rookies and Taylor Jenkins to set a new culture

results.title: NASCAR Drivers Tackle Sonoma Raceway's Twisting Road Course Wine Country Style

results.title: Horrifying moment car plows through jubilant fans at World Cup watch party
results.description: The horrifying incident unfolded just hours after Mexico's 3-0 win over Czechia in their final group stage game, as thousands of fans took to the streets to take part in the celebrations.
